-%0Atype Node struct %7B%0A%09char rune%0A%09prev *Node%0A%09next *Node%0A%7D%0A%0Afunc main() %7B%0A%09var input string%0A%09fmt.Scan(&input)%0A%0A%09head := &Node%7B%7D%0A%09cursor := head%0A%0A%09for _, char := range input %7B%0A%0A%09%09if char == 'R' %7B%0A%09%09%09char = '%5Cn'%0A%09%09%7D%0A%0A%09%09switch char %7B%0A%09%09case '%3E':%0A%09%09%09if cursor.next != nil %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = cursor.next%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case '%3C':%0A%09%09%09if cursor != head %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = cursor.prev%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case 'B':%0A%09%09%09if cursor != head %7B%0A%09%09%09%09prev := cursor.prev%0A%09%09%09%09next := cursor.next%0A%09%09%09%09prev.next = next%0A%09%09%09%09if next != nil %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09next.prev = prev%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09%09cursor = prev%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09case 'D':%0A%09%09%09if cursor.next != nil %7B%0A%09%09%09%09del := cursor.next%0A%09%09%09%09next := del.next%0A%09%09%09%09cursor.next = next%0A%09%09%09%09if next != nil %7B%0A%09%09%09%09%09next.prev = cursor%0A%09%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09default:%0A%09%09%09newNode := &Node%7Bchar: char, prev: cursor, next: cursor.next%7D%0A%0A%09%09%09if cursor.next != nil %7B%0A%09%09%09%09cursor.next.prev = newNode%0A%09%09%09%7D%0A%09%09%09cursor.next = newNode%0A%09%09%09cursor = newNode%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09var output %5B%5Drune%0A%09actual := head%0A%09for actual != nil %7B%0A%09%09if actual != head %7B%0A%09%09%09output = append(output, actual.char)%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09if actual == cursor %7B%0A%09%09%09output = append(output, '%7C')%0A%09%09%7D%0A%09%09actual = actual.next%0A%09%7D%0A%0A%09fmt.Println(string(output)
